subject: Tired Of Low Paying Loads? Lets Change that.
body:
Hello,

Let’s be honest—diesel is high, broker rates are down, and sitting empty at a truck stop waiting for a decent load is eating away your profit margins.

At AR Transport, we don’t just book random freight. We treat Carriers like an asset partner. We analyze your weekly route preferences to string together high-paying backhauls, keeping your gross revenue consistent week after week.

What we bring to the table:

Direct, non-public broker freight lines.

24/7 dedicated dispatch coverage (no voicemail tag).

Custom maintenance and tire fuel-perk discounts after 1 year.

If you're tired of doing all the paperwork yourself, reply to this email or call us back. Let's talk about what your trucks need to gross this week to make it worth your time.

Best regards,
Manager, AR Transport
